title: Lesson 87: (Grammar) - indicates possessive; nominalizes verbs and adject...

intro_cards.title: Particle の: Possessive & Linking
intro_cards.body:
の connects nouns to show possession or relationship.

1. Possession:
• 私の本 (my book) • 先生の車 (the teacher's car)

2. Describing/qualifying a noun:
• 日本語の本 (a Japanese-language book)
• 先生の部屋 (the teacher's room)

3. の as placeholder noun ('the one that is ~'):
• 大きいのが好き。(I like the big one.)
• 赤いのを買った。(I bought the red one.)

4. の to nominalize verbs:
• 泳ぐのが好きです。(I like swimming.)
